# meuwe

## About

meuwe is a hyperlocal social map for discovering and sharing local events in real time. It shows events happening nearby on a map — no algorithm, no ads, no account required to browse.

## What it does

- Shows local events (concerts, picnics, sports, markets, meetups) on an interactive map
- Users can create events in under 10 seconds — title is the only required field
- Supports private events visible only to people with an invite link
- Push notifications for followed events
- Works without creating an account (account needed only to add events, via Google or Apple sign-in)
- Available in 4 languages: Polish, English, German, Spanish

## Who uses it

Individuals: people who want to discover what is happening in their neighbourhood
Organisers: anyone wanting to share a local event — bar concerts, street musicians, garage sales, volunteer cleanups, dog owner meetups, skill swaps
Communities: sports clubs, local groups, vendors (food trucks, farm produce), local alert networks

## Tech stack

React 19, TypeScript, Supabase (PostgreSQL + Realtime + Auth), Leaflet maps, Cloudflare Pages, Capacitor (iOS/Android native app)

## Availability

- Web app: https://meuwe.eu
- iOS: App Store
- Android: Google Play

## Legal

- Terms of service: https://meuwe.eu/terms.html
